Togetic

#0175 Togepi #0177 Natu
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Togetic is a Fairy/Flying type Pokémon introduced in Generation 2.

Togetic

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0176
Type Fairy Flying
Species Happiness Pokémon
Height 0.6 m (2′00″)
Weight 3.2 kg (7.1 lbs)
Abilities 1. Hustle
2. Serene Grace
Super Luck (hidden ability)
Local № 0047 (Gold/Silver/Crystal)
0174 (Platinum)
0047 (HeartGold/SoulSilver)
0258 (Sword/Shield)
0128 (Legends: Arceus)

Training

EV yield 2 Sp. Def
Catch rate 75 (9.8% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 142
Growth Rate Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Fairy, Flying
Gender 87.5% male, 12.5% female
Egg cycles 10 (2,314–2,570 steps)

Base stats

HP 55
220 314
Attack 40
76 196
Defense 85
157 295
Sp. Atk 80
148 284
Sp. Def 105
193 339
Speed 40
76 196
Total 405 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Evolution chart

#0175
Togepi
Fairy
(high Friendship)
#0176
Togetic
Fairy · Flying
(use Shiny Stone)
#0468
Togekiss
Fairy · Flying

Togetic changes

  • In Generations 2-5, Togetic is Normal/Flying type.
  • In Generations 2-4, Togetic has a base experience yield of 114.
  • In Generations 2-7, Togetic has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Gold They say that it will appear before kindhearted, caring people and shower them with happiness.
Silver It grows dispirited if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.
Crystal Although it does not flap its wings very much, it can stay up in the air as it tags along after its trainer.
Ruby
Sapphire		 TOGETIC is said to be a POKéMON that brings good fortune. When the POKéMON spots someone who is pure of heart, it is said to appear and share its happiness with that person.
FireRed It grows dispirited if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.
LeafGreen They say that it will appear before kindhearted, caring people and shower them with happiness.
Emerald It is said to be a POKéMON that brings good fortune. When it spots someone who is pure of heart, a TOGETIC appears and shares its happiness with that person.
Diamond
Pearl		 It is said to appear in front of kindly people to scatter a glowing down called “joy dust.”
Platinum To share its happiness, it flies around the world seeking kindhearted people.
HeartGold They say that it will appear before kindhearted, caring people and shower them with happiness.
SoulSilver It grows dispirited if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.
Black
White
Black 2
White 2		 To share its happiness, it flies around the world seeking kind-hearted people.
X It grows dispirited if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.
Y They say that it will appear before kindhearted, caring people and shower them with happiness.
Omega Ruby
Alpha Sapphire		 Togetic is said to be a Pokémon that brings good fortune. When the Pokémon spots someone who is pure of heart, it is said to appear and share its happiness with that person.
Sword They say that it will appear before kindhearted, caring people and shower them with happiness.
Shield It grows dispirited if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.
Brilliant Diamond
Shining Pearl		 It is said to appear in front of kindly people to scatter a glowing down called joy dust.
Legends: Arceus No records exist of Togetic being seen in the wilds. Rumors abound that it evolves under the loving care of a trusted human companion, upon whom the Pokémon then bestows great joy.

Legends: Z-A Legends: Arceus

Moves learnt by level up

Togetic does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Togetic cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by level up

Acc.

Answers to Togetic questions

  • Which is statistically better: Togetic, Noctowl or Staraptor? (Platinum)?
  • Does Hustle affect 'infinite accuracy' moves?
  • Will trading affect happiness?
  • Level 30 togetic with hustle ability and careful nature, should I breed to reroll?
  • How does Togepi/Togetic/Togekiss learn Body Slam?
  • At what level should I evolve Togepi into Togetic?
  • 6 IV parents producing 4 IV offspring?
  • What kind of Pokemon do you need to breed to get a Togetic?
  • Why do people use togekiss > togetic in competitive play?
  • Why won't I get any female Togepis?
